ddls:
CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_status" TEXT /* Status of the topic (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the module belongs to */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "module_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the module */,
  "module_description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "module_status" TEXT /* Status of the module (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the module was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the module was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modules_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the resource belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Structure of the resource (e.g., Linear, Hierarchy) */,
  "lr_type" TEXT /* Type of learning resource (e.g., text, figure, diagram) */,
  "intractive_type" TEXT /* Type of interactivity (e.g., Expositive) */,
  "intractive_level" TEXT /* Level of interactivity (e.g., Very low) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the resource (e.g., html/text, html/graphics) */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the resource (e.g., easy, medium, difficult) */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the resource is published */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was published */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the resource */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_status FOREIGN KEY ("resource_status") REFERENCES resource_statuses ("resource_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_version_status FOREIGN KEY ("version_status") REFERENCES version_statuses ("version_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, student, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" INTEGER /* ID of the job title of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_job_title FOREIGN KEY ("job_title") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access type (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_access_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_type_id") REFERENCES access_types ("access_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_types" (
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access type */,
  "access_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the access type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_statuses" (
  "resource_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource status */,
  "resource_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_statuses" (
  "version_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version status */,
  "version_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the version status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_statuses" (
  "rating_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating status */,
  "rating_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_statuses" (
  "comment_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment status */,
  "comment_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the comment status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comment status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review or comment given by the user */,
  "rating_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_ratings_rating_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_status_id") REFERENCES rating_statuses ("rating_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment given by the user */,
  "comment_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_comments_comment_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_status_id") REFERENCES comment_statuses ("comment_status_id")
)
